must_show: CLI and local Web Console enter the same service layer
RunService builds contextual LangGraph with thin nodes
YAML artifacts are formal handoff facts
SQLite stores run indexes, events, checkpoints and locks
03_verification_plan.yaml maps acceptance criteria to evidence paths
Browser validation and image asset request are tool evidence paths
07_goal_satisfaction.yaml evaluates each criterion against gate/tool/manual evidence
Bounded repair is used when gates, tool checks or goal satisfaction fail
Web Goal Loop exposes rerun-tool-checks and rerun-satisfaction
Evidence Bundle decides delivery readiness with gates, review, goal satisfaction and tool results
do_not_show_as_implemented: codex_sdk as the default implemented backend
Codex CLI directly writing Coductor structured YAML
SQLAlchemy storage replacing current sqlite3 storage
Web Console SSE or realtime push

diagrams.title: Coductor 系统架构总览
diagrams.purpose: Explain the product boundary across entry, control plane, execution, verification, artifacts and persistence.
regions: Entry: CLI, Local Web Console, controlled actions
Control: RunService, LangGraph, WorkflowState, SQLite locks
Quality: Quality Gates, Tool Verification, Goal Satisfaction
Truth layer: YAML Artifacts, Tool Runs, SQLite, Target Repo

diagrams.title: Coductor 端到端运行流程
diagrams.purpose: Show how a run becomes evidence-backed delivery, including tool checks, satisfaction evaluation, repair and human control.
branches: Spec or parallel plan approval -> human_required -> approve + resume
Gate/tool/satisfaction failure -> bounded repair -> rerun verification
Uncertain evidence or max repair attempts -> human_required

diagrams.title: Coductor Artifact / State 流转
diagrams.purpose: Show fixed YAML facts, tool evidence, repair evidence, run states, SQLite persistence and stale protection.
diagrams.compatibility_note: 03_* and 07_* each have two semantic files; current code reads fixed filenames.
